expiredAdmin: Your trial has expired. You are in read-only mode.
expiredUser: Your trial has expired. Read-only mode — contact your administrator to upgrade.
blockedBody: Access to this organization is currently suspended. Contact support or your administrator.
actionBlocked: This action is not available while your subscription is expired.
upgradeSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to continue using {{appName}}
suspendedIntro: Your organization's account has been suspended. This may be due to:
suspendedContact: Contact us to resolve this issue:
allSetBody: Your organization has full access to all features.
pendingBodyActivation: You have a pending activation request submitted on {{date}}. We'll notify you once it's processed.
pendingBodyExtension: You have a pending extension request submitted on {{date}}. We'll notify you once it's processed.
introBody: {{appName}} is free and open source. Your support helps us maintain and improve the platform for everyone.
donateSubtitle: Make a one-time donation to get full access. Choose your support level:
alreadyDonated: Already donated? Click here to submit activation request
extendSubtitle: Need more time? Request an extension and tell us why.
extendReasonLabel: Why do you need more time? *
extendSpecifyPlaceholder: Tell us more about your situation...
adsSubtitle: Get full access to all features for free. We'll show non-intrusive ads to support development.
adsExpect1: Full access to all features — no restrictions
adsExpect2: Small banner ads in sidebar and dashboard
adsExpect3: No ads during attendance punch or critical workflows
adsExpect4: Upgrade to ad-free anytime with a donation
adsNote: By accepting, you agree to see advertisements. Your data will not be shared with ad networks.

errors.reasonRequired: Please select or enter a reason

success.donationSubmitted: Request submitted! We'll review it shortly.
